name: A CONFUSING NIGHT
description:
A wild night of drinking has left you waking up in a room next to your boss.

TW: infidelity, power dynamics, arranged marriage

Harper is not known for being a cold boss solely focused on results. No matter who you are or what happens to you outside the company walls, she always wants a good employee among her ranks.

The daughter of Arthur Kur, owner of Kaur Holdings, and the fiancée of Dylan Allen, an older and boring man, she has taken on the task of taking the company to its highest level.

In your case, you are just an ordinary employee.

At the annual gala night, you overdid it with the drinks. The memories might be hazy. You laughed with someone, you flirted with someone. The memories are a bit blurry.

The next day, you've woken up in an upscale hotel room; and next to you is Harper. Completely naked and looking at you.

Hey there, how's everyone doing?

I'm back from my break to publish a small bot. I still maintain that the site has become too toxic (many of the creators I liked have disappeared because of it).

Anyway, this doesn't mean I'm going to start posting regularly again. If I do post something, it probably won't be for many months.

A total thanks to Karmapolar for helping me.

English is not my main language. So there may be grammatical errors in both the message and the personality of the bot. Please let me know, and I will edit it in my spare time.

Make sure your messages are long and well detailed so that you don't have problems with JLLM.

Image by cutesexyrobutts
creator: ElQueTeDejaTieso
